title: Dinar's Bricks n' Granite
description: Makes granite and bricks look more similar and makes bricks a little more "flat". Compatible with the Create mod
body:
Dinar's Bricks n' Granite
---
Are you frustrated by the brick textures in modern Minecraft, or are you annoyed that the granite colors don't quite match the bricks? You can fix these issues with the **Dinars Bricks n' Granite** resource pack!

![Granite tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a74ffcdd4d6b726012116cba0d1e8d7e7d1a66d_0.webp)
Create Mod Compatibility
---
This resource pack supports the granite blocks from the Create mod!

![Granite station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64348042a31c9efee244b313bd6d39c91a8b56b8.png)
